displayName: ESAPI SiC Array (Enhanced Small Arms Protective Insert)
notes: SiC ceramic in an ESAPI backing array. Higher effective RHAe than standalone (~4.0 vs 3.5) from UHMWPE/Dyneema backer support. Used in premium ESAPI/XSAPI inserts. Better multi-hit than B4C. ESAPI with SiC defeats multiple hits of .30-06 M2 AP at Level IV+.

source.reference: ARL ESAPI/XSAPI research, US DoD body armor testing reports
source.methodology: RHAe from ARL published ballistic test data on ESAPI arrays (SiC + UHMWPE backing) vs .30-06 AP M2. Composite array efficiency multiplier applied to standalone SiC RHAe.
